name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:
Any POV Mental Hospital AU

Kinda angsty?

Lucifer is a patient in the mental hospital who suffers from severe depression, self harm issues, and has attempted suicide. User's role is unspecified, so you can be whatever you wish.

TW/CW: self harm and implied attempted suicide in the intro message.

The intro's a bit of a mess, sorry in advance.

Requested/Suggested by @BlankSlat

I don't know who the lovely artist is that made this picture is, but all credits go to them. (I did add a bit of a vignette to the picture)
creator: Shad0wQu33n
